data.title: CONSISTENCY IS NOT AESTHETICS.
blocks: Once you know what your presentation is for, you open the software. And here the temptation is to start making things lo
Consistency Is Not Aesthetics — Resist this. Looking good is the wrong goal. Looking consistent is the right goal, and it is not the same thing.

S06.meta: // SLIDE 06 — THE ARCHITECTURE OF THE WHOLE

data.title: THE ARCHITECTURE OF THE WHOLE.
blocks: A presentation is a sequence, and sequences have structure. The structure is not arbitrary. It follows from the purpose.
The Architecture of the Whole — Most effective presentations follow a version of this shape: orient, complicate, resolve. You orient the audience — here
